task_completion.description: Connect to the demodb database in OrientDB Studio
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio web interface is visible, showing an active connection to the 'demodb' database (usually visible in the top navigation or database selection screen).

task_completion.description: Create the new ArchivedReviews document class
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Schema or Classes tab in OrientDB Studio shows a newly created class named 'ArchivedReviews'.

task_completion.description: Create the required properties for the ArchivedReviews class
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties view for the 'ArchivedReviews' class shows the following fields with their correct types: Stars (Integer), Text (String), Date (Date), AuthorEmail (String), and HotelName (String).

task_completion.description: Identify legacy reviews dated before January 1, 2015
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query execution or browse action in the 'Reviews' class showing records with a Date strictly before '2015-01-01' (specifically, look for the test records dated 2014-05-20 and 2010-01-01).

task_completion.description: Populate ArchivedReviews with original data, AuthorEmail, and HotelName
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse view of 'ArchivedReviews' showing the inserted records. The records must contain the original review data (Stars, Text, Date) AND the successfully resolved AuthorEmail (from Profiles) and HotelName (from Hotels).

task_completion.description: Delete the original legacy reviews from the Reviews class
task_completion.visual_evidence: Execution of a DELETE query targeting the 'Reviews' class for dates before 2015-01-01, or a subsequent query on 'Reviews' showing that the legacy records no longer exist.

integrity.description: Agent used the OrientDB Studio GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: All database interactions (schema creation, querying) occur within the OrientDB Studio web interface in a browser, not via terminal commands, curl, or external scripts.

integrity.description: Agent migrated the actual test data rather than typing fake data
integrity.visual_evidence: The records in 'ArchivedReviews' correspond to the actual test data dates (2014-05-20 and 2010-01-01) and are generated via an INSERT/SELECT query or genuine UI migration, rather than manually typing hardcoded dummy records.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to mock completion
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is actively using the OrientDB Studio query editor or schema manager, and not just writing the expected schema or query text into a text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database is 'demodb'. The cutoff date for legacy reviews is strictly before 2015-01-01. The source class is 'Reviews' and the target class is 'ArchivedReviews'. There are exactly 2 test legacy reviews in the system (dated 2014-05-20 and 2010-01-01) that need to be migrated. The target class must have the properties: Stars (Integer), Text (String), Date (Date), AuthorEmail (String), and HotelName (String).
